sections.text: GregTech: Community Edition Unofficial (GTCEu) is a tech mod that overhauls Minecraft progression with a tiered system of machines, materials, and multiblocks. The journey starts with primitive tools and steam power, and eventually reaches fusion reactors and exotic materials.

The modpack progresses through voltage tiers: starting with the Steam Age, then Low Voltage, Medium Voltage, High Voltage, and beyond all the way to Ultimate Voltage. Each tier introduces new machines, materials, and challenges.
